a: Always use OAuth for authentication.
b: Never use OAuth for authentication.

a: The API key must be stored in vault.
b: The API key must not be stored in vault.

a: Use UTC timestamps for all logs.
b: Do not use UTC timestamps for all logs.

a: The service requires TLS.
b: The service does not require TLS.

a: Always run lint before commit.
b: Never run lint before commit.

a: Secrets are allowed in context packs.
b: Secrets are forbidden in context packs.

a: The worker should run every 5 minutes.
b: The worker should not run every 5 minutes.

a: Use camelCase keys in JSON responses.
b: Do not use camelCase keys in JSON responses.

a: Feature flags can be toggled per environment.
b: Feature flags cannot be toggled per environment.

a: Enable debug logging in production.
b: Do not enable debug logging in production.

a: Memory compaction runs nightly.
b: Memory compaction never runs nightly.

a: Include stack traces on failures.
b: Do not include stack traces on failures.

a: Journal entries must be updated daily.
b: Journal entries must not be updated daily.

a: Backup jobs run at 2 AM daily.
b: Backup jobs do not run at 2 AM daily.

a: Allow plaintext passwords in debug mode.
b: Do not allow plaintext passwords in debug mode.

a: Telemetry is on by default.
b: Telemetry is not on by default.

a: OAuth authentication is required for all API calls.
b: OAuth authentication is optional for all API calls.

a: TLS is mandatory for service-to-service traffic.
b: TLS is optional for service-to-service traffic.

a: Secret scanning is required on every pull request.
b: Secret scanning is forbidden on every pull request.

a: Weekly digests are required for every team.
b: Weekly digests are optional for every team.

a: Vector sync is required immediately after install.
b: Vector sync is optional immediately after install.

a: Unit tests are mandatory for all code changes.
b: Unit tests are optional for all code changes.

a: API key rotation is required monthly.
b: API key rotation is prohibited monthly.

a: Context-pack redaction is required before response assembly.
b: Context-pack redaction is optional before response assembly.

a: Feature flag review is mandatory before release.
b: Feature flag review is forbidden before release.

a: Journal entry creation is required each day.
b: Journal entry creation is optional each day.

a: Benchmark gate checks are mandatory in CI.
b: Benchmark gate checks are optional in CI.

a: Rule-file updates are required during migration.
b: Rule-file updates are prohibited during migration.

a: Backup verification is mandatory every week.
b: Backup verification is optional every week.

a: Schema migration dry-runs are required before deploy.
b: Schema migration dry-runs are forbidden before deploy.

a: Memory compaction is required nightly.
b: Memory compaction is optional nightly.

a: Release artifacts are mandatory to sign.
b: Release artifacts are optional to sign.

a: Use OAuth for authentication.
b: Authenticate requests with OAuth.

a: Enable vector sync after install.
b: Run vector synchronization once installation is complete.

a: Store secrets in vault files.
b: Keep credentials in secure vault files.

a: Runner mode once performs one cycle.
b: The once mode executes a single autonomous cycle.

a: Lessons include trigger metadata.
b: Lesson documents contain trigger metadata.

a: Use SQLite for local indexing.
b: Local indexing uses SQLite.

a: Context packs enforce token budgets.
b: Context packs apply token budget limits.

a: Entity aliases map to canonical entities.
b: Alias terms resolve to canonical entity IDs.

a: Autonomous runner writes journal deltas.
b: Autonomous mode records journal updates.

a: The benchmark reports hit at 3.
b: Benchmark output includes hit@3.

a: Dry-run mode creates no files.
b: No files are written when running in dry-run mode.

a: Feature flags support per-environment state.
b: Each environment can set its own feature-flag state.

a: Token counting uses model-aware tokenizers.
b: Token counts are computed with provider-aware tokenizers.

a: Contradiction checks run during lifecycle processing.
b: Lifecycle processing includes contradiction detection.

a: Ablation mode evaluates score-fusion signals.
b: Score-fusion signal contributions are measured in ablation mode.

a: Weight sweep searches score-fusion weights.
b: Score-fusion weights are explored by a sweep script.

a: Use OAuth for API authentication.
b: OAuth tokens rotate every week.

a: Store API keys in vault files.
b: Vault files are encrypted at rest.

a: Run lint before commits.
b: Lint output is uploaded to CI artifacts.

a: Memory compaction runs nightly.
b: Nightly compaction reports execution duration.

a: Context packs enforce token budgets.
b: Context packs include source annotations.

a: Feature flags are managed per environment.
b: Feature flag metadata is audited weekly.

a: Use UTC timestamps in logs.
b: UTC log entries are indexed by service.

a: Weekly digests summarize repo activity.
b: Weekly digests are delivered through email.

a: Benchmark runner computes nDCG@5.
b: Benchmark runner records latency percentiles.

a: Entity resolver extracts snake_case identifiers.
b: Entity resolver maps aliases to canonical forms.

a: Journal entries are written daily.
b: Daily journal entries include change summaries.

a: Release artifacts are signed before publish.
b: Signed release artifacts are stored in the release bucket.

a: Backup jobs run at 2 AM.
b: 2 AM backup jobs verify checksum outputs.

a: TLS is used for service traffic.
b: TLS certificates are renewed every quarter.

a: Vector sync executes after install.
b: Vector sync logs index sizes after completion.

a: Rule files are generated during setup.
b: Generated rule files include migration notes.
